shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' .agents/skills/mempal-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- repo status ---\\n' && git status --short && printf '\\n--- top-level ---\\n' && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!dist'"' | head -20"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "react-hook-form shouldUseNativeValidation radio group setCustomValidity multiple refs" --json --top-k 5'
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,110p' src/logic/validateField.ts && sed -n '2170,2300p' src/__tests__/logic/validateField.test.tsx && rg -n \"interface FieldRefs|FieldRefs|refs:\" src/types src | head -80"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,90p' src/types/fields.ts && sed -n '270,300p' src/logic/validateField.ts && sed -n '1460,1500p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts && sed -n '2150,2190p' src/__tests__/logic/validateField.test.tsx"
/bin/bash -lc 'git diff -- src/logic/validateField.ts && git status --short && node_modules/.bin/prettier --check src/logic/validateField.ts'
